ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trucks" (
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck */,
  "truck_number" TEXT /* Truck number for identification */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the truck */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the truck */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the truck was manufactured */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the truck */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the truck */,
  "current_odometer" INTEGER /* Current odometer reading of the truck */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Last service date of the truck */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled service date */,
  "service_interval" INTEGER /* Service interval in miles or days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the truck (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "insurance_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the truck insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("truck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trucks_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of financial transaction (e.g., A/P, Credits, Deductions, Load Advances) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the transaction record */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction (e.g., cash, check, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the owner */,
  "registration_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the truck registration */,
  "is_company" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the owner is a company or an individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck associated with the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., Balance Sheet, Income Statement) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES financial_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck associated with the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., Oil Change, Tire Replacement) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic who performed the maintenance */,
  "mechanic_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the mechanic */,
  "next_service_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the next service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_records" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck associated with the fuel record */,
  "fuel_date" TEXT /* Date the fuel was purchased */,
  "gallons" TEXT /* Number of gallons purchased */,
  "cost_per_gallon" TEXT /* Cost per gallon */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the fuel */,
  "odometer_reading" INTEGER /* Odometer reading at the time of fueling */,
  "fuel_station" TEXT /* Name of the fuel station */,
  "fuel_station_location" TEXT /* Location of the fuel station */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., diesel, gasoline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_records_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_records" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load record */,
  "truck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the truck associated with the load */,
  "load_number" TEXT /* Load number for identification */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date the load was picked up */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the load was delivered */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Location where the load was picked up */,
  "delivery_location" TEXT /* Location where the load was delivered */,
  "load_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the load in pounds */,
  "load_value" TEXT /* Value of the load */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who ordered the load */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the load */,
  "load_status" TEXT /* Status of the load (e.g., picked up, in transit, delivered) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "load_description" TEXT /* Description of the load */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_records_truck_id FOREIGN KEY ("truck_id") REFERENCES trucks ("truck_id")
)
